main.description: Species interaction documenting ecological relationship between organisms.

subjectA.description: The first subject (actor) in the interaction.

subjectB.description: The second subject (recipient) in the interaction.

interactionType.description: Type of ecological interaction between the subjects.

direction.description: Direction of the interaction: AtoB means A acts on B, BtoA means B acts on A, bidirectional means mutual.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this record was created.

interactionSubject.description: A subject in an interaction - can reference an existing occurrence or just specify a taxon.

occurrence.description: Reference to an existing occurrence record.

taxon.description: Taxonomic information for the organism (for unobserved subjects or to specify the taxon).
Taxonomic information following Darwin Core Taxon class (dwc:Taxon).

scientificName.description: The full scientific name, with authorship and date information if known (Darwin Core dwc:scientificName).

taxonRank.description: The taxonomic rank of the identification (Darwin Core dwc:taxonRank).

kingdom.description: Taxonomic kingdom for disambiguating homonyms (Darwin Core dwc:kingdom).
